selection_basis: Repeated descriptive failed-escape/re-entry behaviour with adequate event frequency across both years, all eight symbols, both directions and all sessions; selected without strategy execution or profitability ranking.
economic_rationale: A close outside a recent range can attract continuation orders and stops. An immediate, directional close back inside the range demonstrates rejection of that auction and can force trapped breakout participants to unwind toward the opposite side. Structural risk is bounded by the escape extreme.

setup.market_regime: all; regime is recorded but is not a gate
setup.structural_context: range high and low over the 20 fully closed candles immediately preceding the escape candle
setup.required_price_pattern: escape candle closes at least 0.10 ATR14 outside the prior range; the immediately following failure candle closes at least 0.15 ATR14 back inside, has body/range >= 0.50, and its body points in the reversal direction
setup.higher_timeframe_condition: last fully closed 1h EMA20/EMA50 context must be available and recorded; no directional filter
setup.volume_or_volatility_condition: ATR14 must be finite and positive; volume ratio is recorded, not gated
setup.cost_distance_condition: distance from next-open entry to TP1 must be at least 72 basis points

entry.trigger: the failed-escape candle closes and satisfies every setup condition
entry.direction: LONG after failed downside escape; SHORT after failed upside escape
entry.timing: market order at the next 15m candle open
entry.no_lookahead: range ends before escape; escape and failure candles are fully closed; entry uses only their data and the next open

invalidation.structure: LONG stop at failed downside escape candle low; SHORT stop at failed upside escape candle high
invalidation.maximum_stop: entry-to-stop distance <= 2.0 ATR14 measured on the failure candle
invalidation.invalid: reject if stop is not strictly beyond entry in the loss direction, ATR is unavailable, or required candles/1h context are incomplete

exit.break_even: after completed TP1 partial, move stop to fee-adjusted break-even using frozen 12 bps entry-plus-exit cost allowance
exit.maximum_holding: 8 fully elapsed 15m candles after entry; close at candle 8 close if still open

risk.maximum_notional: 35% of available equity times leverage cap
risk.exchange_constraints: frozen execution contract tick, lot, minimum quantity and minimum notional rules; invalid orders fail closed

suppression.candidate_identity: strategy + symbol + direction + failure-candle open timestamp
suppression.duplicates: same candidate candle is emitted once
suppression.same_symbol_overlap: an active same-symbol lifecycle blocks another entry
suppression.conflicting_signals: existing selector resolves conflicts; this preregistration does not change selector behaviour

parameter_register.name: range_lookback
parameter_register.rationale: defines a local auction boundary before escape
parameter_register.expected_effect: longer windows reduce event frequency and widen structural context

parameter_register.name: minimum_escape
parameter_register.formula: distance of escape close beyond range / failure-candle ATR14
parameter_register.expected_effect: higher values retain more displaced escapes

parameter_register.name: minimum_reentry
parameter_register.formula: distance of failure close back inside boundary / ATR14
parameter_register.rationale: requires observable rejection inside the old auction

parameter_register.name: minimum_failure_body_fraction
parameter_register.rationale: requires the failure close to be driven by body movement rather than wick alone
parameter_register.expected_effect: higher values select more directional failure candles

parameter_register.name: minimum_tp1_distance
parameter_register.rationale: three times frozen 24 bps round-trip execution cost
parameter_register.expected_effect: rejects structures whose first reward is mechanically cost-dominated

parameter_register.name: entry_delay
parameter_register.expected_effect: makes the signal executable after confirmation

parameter_register.name: maximum_stop_distance
parameter_register.rationale: bounds risk when the escape extreme is remote

parameter_register.name: tp1_multiple
parameter_register.rationale: first realization beyond round-trip cost for eligible structures
parameter_register.expected_effect: higher values reduce target reach frequency

parameter_register.name: final_target_multiple
parameter_register.rationale: captures forced unwind beyond first target

parameter_register.name: maximum_holding_candles
parameter_register.formula: entry candle through eighth elapsed candle
parameter_register.rationale: the causal unwind should occur within two hours
parameter_register.expected_effect: longer holds admit behaviour unrelated to immediate rejection

split.validation_design_use: descriptive price-behaviour stability only; no trades, PnL, threshold choice or family ranking

phase3c_evaluation.rejection_rule: reject v1 if any acceptance criterion is false
phase3c_evaluation.technical_invalidation: invalidate the attempt without interpreting performance if preregistration hash differs, data boundaries overlap, leakage occurs, candidate/trade reconciliation differs, or any trade/outcome is unresolved
phase3c_evaluation.immutability: any rule, threshold, cost, acceptance criterion or implementation-semantics change creates a new version and permanently invalidates this v1 validation attempt

phase3c_minimal_plan: implement one research-only detector matching this document
add closed-candle, direction, boundary, stop and duplicate unit tests
prove candidate counts on development data and freeze implementation hash
unlock locked-validation execution only when document hash matches and tests are green
run one frozen development report and one locked validation report; do not tune v1
risks_and_limitations: descriptive validation close_8 mean is negative despite a positive median
eight-candle MFE and MAE are similar, so path ordering may eliminate apparent opportunity
the descriptive TP1-touch diagnostic omits executable next-open movement and costs
events overlap in time and are not equivalent to independent trades
no directional, symbol, session, volume or HTF filter is justified by the frozen evidence
